name: pollek-cloud
description: Pollek Cloud commercial control-plane foundation for SaaS and private cloud deployments.
author: AEC Infraconnect

scripts.contracts:generate: npm run contracts:openapi && npm run contracts:sdk
scripts.audit:foundation: node --check apps/api/server.mjs && node --check apps/api/db.mjs && node --check apps/api/keycloak.mjs && node --check apps/api/signer.mjs && node --check apps/web/static/app.js && npm run contracts:check && npm test
